sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n67634" key="mhxanopoi/hma" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">μηχᾰνο-ποίημα</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ατος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τό</gen>, <sense id="n67634.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">mechanical construction</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg2049.tlg001:8" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Sallust.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">8</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
